title: Inject teammate and double-stack strategy context
summary: Teams coordinate pit timing across two cars, sometimes double-stacking under urgent conditions but often staggering stops to avoid queueing.
rationale: Teams coordinate pit timing across two cars, sometimes double-stacking under urgent conditions but often staggering stops to avoid queueing. The dataset lacks Team, so Driver alone misses this strategic coupling.
implementation_hint: Map Driver-Year to Team from public 2022-2025 lineups, then add teammate_pitted_current_lap, teammate_pitted_previous_lap, teammate_tyre_age_gap, teammate_position_gap, same_team_double_stack_pressure, and team_stop_count. For historical/non-F1 or pre-season rows, fall back to learned co-occurrence clusters or missing-team category.
expected_effect: Adds ensemble-diverse signal for synchronized safety-car stops and suppressed second-car stops when double-stacking is unattractive.
risk: Driver code ambiguity and mid-season substitutions can create wrong team links; keep mapping versioned and add an unknown/ambiguous flag.
